questions.q: What is the media planner's first step when designing a campaign?
questions.explanation: The plan starts with the business goal; from it you derive the objective, the conversion location and the performance goal.

questions.q: At which hierarchy level is the campaign objective chosen?
questions.explanation: The objective is chosen at the campaign level. Conversion location, event and performance goal go at the ad set level.

questions.q: Sales website with the Purchase event requires which data source:
questions.explanation: Pixel + CAPI together recover lost signal and improve match quality. The SDK is for apps.

options: Event = which action counts; performance goal = how it's optimized/bid
Event goes in the campaign; performance goal in the ad
Performance goal only applies to Awareness
questions.explanation: The conversion event defines the action (Purchase, Lead); the performance goal defines the optimization rule (number, value, clicks, recall).

questions.q: A B2B company wants scheduled demos without taking the prospect out of the feed. Best combination?
questions.explanation: Leads with an Instant form minimizes friction: the form is completed within Meta. An external landing page adds a conversion drop.
